title: ervum aurantium
intro: Ervum aurantium, also known as bitter orange, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ervum aurantium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and supporting weight loss. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and supplements, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
